nodes.name: White-headed brushfinch
nodes.summary: The white-headed brushfinch (Atlapetes albiceps) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae. It is found in Ecuador and Peru. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forest and subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. References
nodes.shortSummary: The white-headed brushfinch (Atlapetes albiceps) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae. It is found in Ecuador and Peru.
